commit_scope: Ship m4e2: list values as an arena heap in the emitted fourth sibling, with EMPTY/CONS/HEAD/TAIL/LEN/NTH compiled into the native C walker after the BMF cursor BUF lane and proven by three-way bands plus the physical fourth-kernel audit.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-heap-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-call-band.fk

local_validation.summary: fourth-heap-band holds three-way at 15. The emitted sibling keeps tag 17 as BUF for the streaming BMF cursor and now carries tags 18..23 for EMPTY, CONS, HEAD, TAIL, LEN, and NTH. fourth-os-band was recalibrated to the widened deterministic source lengths (universal 4059 bytes, JIT 3974 bytes) and holds at 15. The fourth-kernel audit compiled the universal walker and loaded a heap table that returned 25 from head([7,8]) + head(tail([7,8])) + len([7,8]) + nth([7,8],1).

observed_delta.reserved_existing_tag: 17 BUF remains the BMF streaming cursor eye

known_limitations.limitation: The heap is a fixed 4096-cell arena in the emitted C, with 0 as the empty pointer and no GC or overflow policy beyond the small-audit mask.
known_limitations.follow_up: The m4e3 real-recipe flattener and later band ratchet can decide whether temporary arena release, bounds checks, or growable arenas are needed before broad validate.sh fourth-arm use.

known_limitations.limitation: Textual source through the standalone compiler-binary still needs m4e4 strings and the m4e3 real-recipe bridge.
known_limitations.follow_up: Next milestone remains m4e3: read compiled .fk recipe cells through observe/category/value and flatten the real category set into the table.

ci_validation.summary: PR checks have not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: Post-merge deploy has not run yet; no public route behavior changes are expected.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No public route behavior changes. The fourth sibling gains native list heap semantics in emitted C, making Form list structure executable in the universal/JIT walker lane.
test_flows: fourth-heap-band pins EMPTY/CONS/HEAD/TAIL/LEN/NTH table shape and deterministic universal emission three-way at verdict 15.
fourth_kernel_audit.sh compiles the universal walker and runs the heap table natively, returning 25 from the six heap operations over [7,8].
e2e_validation.summary: The runtime delta is proven by three-way Form bands plus native C execution through the fourth-kernel audit.

phase_gate.gate: list heap semantics compile into the emitted sibling and run through the universal binary
phase_gate.next: m4e3 real-recipe flattener: read compiled .fk category/value/children through observe and bring covered bands into the fourth validate arm.
